ingredients_text: Cocoa cookies (35%) [wheat flour, sugar, vegetable oil (palm), corn starch, pasteurized egg whites, cocoa powder (1.1%), skimmed milk powder, salt, emulsifier (sunflower lecithin), artificial color (caramel), artificial flavoring (coconut, chocolate, vanillin)], biscuit (35%) [wheat flour, sugar, vegetable oil (palm), corn starch, pasteurized egg whites, skimmed milk powder, salt, emulsifier (sunflower lecithin), artificial flavoring (coconut, ethyl vanillin)], cocoa cream (30%) [sugar, vegetable oil (palm), hazelnut puree (9%), cocoa powder (9%), milk powder, emulsifier (sunflower lecithin), salt, polyglycerol polyricinoleate (an emulsifier made from glycerol and fatty acids), artificial flavoring (hazelnut, ethyl vanillin)].
product_name: Chocolate cream filled passion cookies, chocolate cream
